roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & ACM REPORT/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5000/BWNUM:3RD/X: 1 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/CTORD:DO NOT CITE OR RELEASE ON WARRANT/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/INTC/CTORD:MR, GOLDMAN IS RELIEVED & MR, RODRIGUEZ IS APPOINTED/BWDNC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANTSHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TOREPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNEDORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & ACM PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/INTC/BWDNC/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS RE-REFERRED TO ACM FOR:/X:CONTACT ACM 2 TIMES PER WEEK, ENROLL & PARTICIPATE IN 25ANGER MANAGMENTSESSIONS & WORK WITH MISSION NEIGHBORHOOD CENTER & PROVIDEWRITTEN PROOF ATCOURT/CONTD:ACM PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:GREG GOLDMAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/GTWM/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL PARTICIPATE IN 25 ANGER MANAGMENT SESSIONS/SA1:CLAUDIA TEXIN/SA2:2084 MISSION ST #211, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & ACM ANGER MANAGMENT PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/
/CAL:ACM PROGRESS REPORT/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5000/BWNUM:2ND/X:DEFENDANT MAY NEED TO BE APPOINTED NEW COUNSEL WHEN PICKED UP/
/CAL:PRETRAIL CONFERENCE & ACM PROGRESS REPORT RE: 25 ANGER MANAGMENT SESSIONS/NEGRPT/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:1ST/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE & & ACM 25 ANGER MANAGMENT SESSION PROGRESS REPORT/INTC/NEGRPT/CONT/DOPU:ACM/
